verses.latin_vulgate: Prima sabbati. Psalmus David.   Domini est terra, et plenitudo ejus ;  orbis terrarum, et universi qui habitant in eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְדָוִ֗ד מִ֫זְמ֥וֹר לַֽ֭יהֹוָה הָאָ֣רֶץ וּמְלוֹאָ֑הּ תֵּ֝בֵ֗ל וְיֹ֣שְׁבֵי בָֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: On the first day of the week, a psalm for David. The earth is the Lord's and the fulness thereof: the world, and all they that dwell therein.
verses.finnish_biblia: Davidin Psalmi. Herran on maa, ja kaikki mitkä siinä ovat, maan piiri ja ne jotka sen päällä asuvat.
verses.king_james: The earth is the Lord’s, and the fulness thereof; the world, and they that dwell therein.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia ipse super maria fundavit eum,  et super flumina præparavit eum.
verses.douay_rheims: For he hath founded it upon the seas; and hath prepared it upon the rivers.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä hän on perustanut sen merten päälle, ja virtain päälle sen vahvistanut.
verses.king_james: For he hath founded it upon the seas, and established it upon the floods.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quis ascendet in montem Domini ?  aut quis stabit in loco sancto ejus ?
verses.douay_rheims: Who shall ascend into the mountain of the Lord: or who shall stand in his holy place?
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuka astuu Herran vuorelle? ja kuka taitaa seisoa hänen pyhässä siassansa?
verses.king_james: Who shall ascend into the hill of the Lord? or who shall stand in his holy place?

verses.latin_vulgate: Innocens manibus et mundo corde,  qui non accepit in vano animam suam,  nec juravit in dolo proximo suo :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נְקִ֥י כַפַּ֗יִם וּֽבַר־לֵ֫בָ֥ב אֲשֶׁ֤ר ׀ לֹא־נָשָׂ֣א לַשָּׁ֣וְא נַפְשִׁ֑י וְלֹ֖א נִשְׁבַּ֣ע לְמִרְמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: The innocent in hands, and clean of heart, who hath not taken his soul in vain, nor sworn deceitfully to his neighbour.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jolla viattomat kädet ovat ja on puhdas sydämestä, joka ei halaja turhuutta eikä vanno väärin,
verses.king_james: He that hath clean hands, and a pure heart; who hath not lifted up his soul unto vanity, nor sworn deceitfully.

verses.latin_vulgate: hic accipiet benedictionem a Domino,  et misericordiam a Deo salutari suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִשָּׂ֣א בְ֭רָכָה מֵאֵ֣ת יְהֹוָ֑ה וּ֝צְדָקָ֗ה מֵאֱלֹהֵ֥י יִשְׁעֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He shall receive a blessing from the Lord, and mercy from God his Saviour.
verses.finnish_biblia: Se saa siunauksen Herralta, ja vanhurskauden autuutensa Jumalalta.
verses.king_james: He shall receive the blessing from the Lord, and righteousness from the God of his salvation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc est generatio quærentium eum,  quærentium faciem Dei Jacob.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֶ֭ה דּ֣וֹר דֹּרְשָׁ֑ו מְבַקְשֵׁ֨י פָנֶ֖יךָ יַעֲקֹ֣ב סֶֽלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: This is the generation of them that seek him, of them that seek the face of the God of Jacob.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä on se sukukunta, joka häntä etsii, joka kysyy sinun kasvojas, Jakob, Sela!
verses.king_james: This is the generation of them that seek him, that seek thy face, O Jacob. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Attollite portas, principes, vestras,  et elevamini, portæ æternales,  et introibit rex gloriæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׂא֤וּ שְׁעָרִ֨ים ׀ רָֽאשֵׁיכֶ֗ם וְֽ֭הִנָּשְׂאוּ פִּתְחֵ֣י עוֹלָ֑ם וְ֝יָב֗וֹא מֶ֣לֶךְ הַכָּבֽוֹד׃
verses.douay_rheims: Lift up your gates, O ye princes, and be ye lifted up, O eternal gates: and the King of Glory shall enter in.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tehkäät portit avaraksi ja ovet maailmassa korkiaksi, kunnian Kuninkaan mennä sisälle.
verses.king_james: Lift up your heads, O ye gates; and be ye lift up, ye everlasting doors; and the King of glory shall come in.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quis est iste rex gloriæ ?  Dominus fortis et potens,  Dominus potens in prælio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִ֥י זֶה֮ מֶ֤לֶךְ הַכָּ֫ב֥וֹד יְ֭הֹוָה עִזּ֣וּז וְגִבּ֑וֹר יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה גִּבּ֥וֹר מִלְחָמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who is this King of Glory? the Lord who is strong and mighty: the Lord mighty in battle.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuka on kunnian Kuningas? se on Herra, väkevä ja voimallinen, Herra voimallinen sodassa.
verses.king_james: Who is this King of glory? The Lord strong and mighty, the Lord mighty in battle.

verses.latin_vulgate: Attollite portas, principes, vestras,  et elevamini, portæ æternales,  et introibit rex gloriæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׂא֤וּ שְׁעָרִ֨ים ׀ רָֽאשֵׁיכֶ֗ם וּ֭שְׂאוּ פִּתְחֵ֣י עוֹלָ֑ם וְ֝יָבֹ֗א מֶ֣לֶךְ הַכָּבֽוֹד׃
verses.douay_rheims: Lift up your gates, O ye princes, and be ye lifted up, O eternal gates: and the King of Glory shall enter in.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tehkäät portit avaraksi ja ovet maailmassa korkiaksi, kunnian Kuninkaan mennä sisälle!
verses.king_james: Lift up your heads, O ye gates; even lift them up, ye everlasting doors; and the King of glory shall come in.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quis est iste rex gloriæ ?  Dominus virtutum ipse est rex gloriæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִ֤י־ה֣וּא זֶה֮ מֶ֤לֶךְ הַכָּ֫ב֥וֹד יְהֹוָ֥ה צְבָא֑וֹת ה֤וּא מֶ֖לֶךְ הַכָּב֣וֹד סֶֽלָה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Who is this King of Glory? the Lord of hosts, he is the King of Glory.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuka on kunnian Kuningas? se on Herra Zebaot, hän on kunnian Kuningas, Sela!
verses.king_james: Who is this King of glory? The Lord of hosts, he is the King of glory. Selah.
